description: Fivetran-generated unique hash ID. Primary key, used for deduplication.
Date of the follower statistic record (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for filtering and trend analysis.
New organic followers gained this day (unpaid growth from content and page discovery).
New paid followers gained this day (from sponsored follow ads).
LinkedIn organization URN identifying the company page (e.g. urn:li:organization:65015275).
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
